reviews.review_description: It was a fun experience but there was no one in sight and it was bare of colors

reviews.review_title: It wasnt that fun as i expected
reviews.review_description: It was kinda bugy the first time I played, i couldnt really do anything, and then i got bored.

This game is great. It has good gamemodes and interesting mechanics. Really fun to just zoom around the map to try and get fastest speeds. Amazing community challenges as well that are fairly difficult but very much worth the effort. Community in general is great and I've never seen a toxic player

This game is so much fun and creative I have never seen a game like this it's so much fun the community is so good I have never seen a toxic player everyone is so nice and always caring and the moderators and devs are some of the nicest people I have met on vr.

Kept coming back to the mini game called shimmer. Find myself grooving to the music 🤌🏼🎶 and the way the flowers light up.. it's magical! 😌 Haven't been able to figure out how other folks in the park run so fast tho. The other mini games are fun too; but maybe more so for a younger audience.

This is a great game so far its very cool the mechanism is very done well the map looking great as it prepares to get revamped everyone should enjoy a new game with new movement like not any other game

reviews.review_title: Game is pretty sick (not a bot)
reviews.review_description: I saw this game and thought it had a unique style so I decided to check it out and it's sick. It has some cool games and some multiplayer options. So check it out, 9/10 game so far.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ive ever tried
reviews.review_description: This game has great movement, also the skins that are coming are sick i hope those updates will get better everytime would be sick if in 4 months there is an cybertech gamemode or a lava map

On my first time playing I was astounded by how many things to do there are. The only thing wrong with the game is that it’s a bit laggy, but that’s due to being on quest 2 anyway. Such a great concept and it’s executed perfectly!

reviews.review_title: Pure VR Chaos with the Homies 😂🔥
reviews.review_description: Yo Whattt.!! This game is actually insane and chaotic💀. Me and my friends couldn’t stop laughing while trying to knock each other off the tracks 💥 and that crown chase mode?? Pure violence 😂 can’t wait for the rhythm mode to drop, def worth checking out fr.

So I have been playing for a few hours now and I love it. Plus getting call to be a content creator is very nice so yea join the discord server and have fun 

P.S my discord is DaMRsmsvr
Good game but pretty buggy… Is What I said 4 days ago but literally the day after I left the review it was all fixed. Amazing game 10/10 would recommend you try.

Tempo Travelers is the kind of game I wish existed when I first got my headset. The vibes are so fun and the Park always has something going on — one second I’m drifting around with my friends, next second we’re all trying to outplay each other in Tomato League. The game gives you so many ways to show off your style and skill without feeling grindy or repetitive.
In its current state it's a little unpolished, but as an early access thing there's definitely potential for an amazing game here, and even if unpolished the current modes are fairly fun.

This game is super fun because of the detail and the movement. The movement is so smooth and you can go really fast which I really like.! *RowdyCowBoyVR7*
￼
Multiple fun mini games, multiplayer, not a gorilla tag fan game, constant giveaways and challenges, good community, hard working devs

I like this game because the Runing in the game is cool
and they are going to add boss that you can fight
This game is so cool,it is all about movement and talk with friends and its allso really nice to chill.This is my favorate game🔥🔥🔥
The first time I try it, I instantly fell in love with the game! It really great game! Really well made with a really nice dev team and an amazing community!
This is a great game and if you like rhythm based games like beat saber this game is for you

reviews.review_title: I think it’s really good for  beta
reviews.review_description:
I love this game because.
1. the movement is original 
2.I love art style 
3. The characters are funny￼
This game is fun but does have some work to do but I bet in the future and after it becomes the full release it will be amazing😁
Took some time to get used to the movements, especially the jump part, but past that, its fun. The park environment is also really beautiful. Was fun zooming around the place at high speeds
I love this game the minigames are so fun! The community is so kind and welcoming and I can see it has been a project with lots of effort and love.
They gave me early access to the game along with only 9 other people. Game launches￼ in 4& hours to the public. HAVE FUN!!!
This game is so fun! Would recommend playing if it is your first time playing vr and the community is so funny and sweet! This could be the next big game beside gorilla tag
Tempo Traveller VR journey that’s perfect for players who enjoy exploration and awesomeness-driven experiences. Its serene tone and artistic design make it stand out.
I got 1k views in one day from this game, the owner is so nice and the game is just fun.
This game is pretty good with a variety of game modes to play too. It'll definitely get better the longer it's around. Do recommend👍
If you like playing fun mini games with your friends that this is the perfect game for you there's also challenges where you can win giftcards it also just got a really big update
I’ve only played for like 20 mins and i’m already hooked. rhythm ride is 🔥 and movement feels super smooth. the way you glide is just fun.
The multiplayer mode is awesome—Tomato League was especially fun. The VR visuals are top-notch. I’d love to see even more minigames added.

this game is a very fun game about music and speed 
they listen to the community and weekly events
This game is really cool
I really love the ideas and I’m so excited to see what is in the future of tempo travelers

reviews.review_title: Best game I have ever played👍🏼👍🏼👍🏼
reviews.review_description: Very good game✅✅✅

reviews.review_description: You may see good reviews but that’s all cap cus this game is not fun the movement sticks and the tut don’t help at all!
tempo traveling 🧳🗿very cool 😎 🆒👶
it has very original aspects and mechanics
Tempo travelers is a super solid vr game. fast, fun, and the movement doesn’t make me sick which is rare lol.
This game is insanely fun and skating around is addictive! 100% coming back for more. 🎮🔥
needs more players but has potential
this game is already amazing and I believe it will have a bright future
So its a combination of different mini-games with a multiplayer mode but the thing I'm waiting for the most is the single-player rhythm mode which I had played in an earlier version.
good and clean
I love this game

I love the way that this game makes me feel. Mario Party is one of my favorite Nintendo games other than Zelda, and the way that this game makes Mario Party mix perfectly with VR physics is awesome. I am also ready for the MASSIVE Revamp this Thursday!

It’s so laggy I can’t even play the game anymore and I started and it’s laggy
 ￼

This game dropped out of nowhere and instantly became a go-to. 😭🤌🏻 i’ve played every day since early access. every match feels a little different because of how the movement lets you play with style. mach n cheese is just good vibes and scarcity scratches that racing itch.

reviews.review_title: Really fun, looking forward for more
reviews.review_description: I loved the rhythm mode and I gotta admit it is a clever use of VR movement. The multiplayer is loads of fun, easy to jump into and play with others, which is rare for me these days. Performance was surprisingly good even on my old quest 2. 5/5

Tempo Travelers is easily the most fun I’ve had in VR in a long time. The movement system is so smooth—it makes just getting around the park a blast on its own. And Tomata League? Absolutely wild. Nonstop chaos in the best way possible.

Thanks to one of the game mods ACHOO this game even supports small Content Creator and thanks is Achoo He ask if I can play his game this made me happy coz as small creator I got notice by Achoo I super happy and thanks you

Just figured out how to walk in VR and boom, I’m sprinting like the Flash. This world feels custom-built for chaos and fun. I’m out here parkouring and racing random players. It already feels worth the download.
I love running around, the map is huge, and the art looks great
The Rhythm level is so beautiful. It's such a vibeee 😌. Tomato League is super fun to play with friends..😄 Can't wait to try out Tomato League tournaments 🔥🔥

It was an overwhelming experience. This can be the future for VR Gaming in the making.

Amazing work done by the team who has created this larger than life experience.
Made me pick up my headset after a long time, love the game and the devs and the whole journey tempos has gone through! Love it guys!

reviews.review_title: Great, Rhythm Ride Feels Like Freedom
reviews.review_description: Tried rhythm ride and instantly vibed with the music and the way the level moves around you. it’s like beat saber but with freedom.
It is sooooo good and I love how you can go against your friends in tomato league it gets a bit competitive

reviews.review_title: Can We Talk About These Skins?! 🤌
reviews.review_description: MORE SKINS. MORE SKINS. MORE SKINS.
